title: Brevo vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Constant Contact. Find out which email marketing platform suits your business needs.
h1: Brevo vs Constant Contact: Feature-by-Feature Comparison
intro: Brevo and Constant Contact are both established email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. Brevo excels as an all-in-one CRM suite with a generous free tier, while Constant Contact is designed for nonprofits and local businesses with straightforward email and social media tools. This comparison will help you determine which platform is the right fit for your marketing strategy.
choose_a_if: You want a free plan with access to 100,000 subscribers and advanced features
You need multi-channel marketing beyond email (SMS, WhatsApp, live chat)
You require transactional email API capabilities and CRM functionality
choose_b_if: You're a nonprofit or local business seeking simplified, beginner-friendly tools
You need built-in e-commerce features and social media ad management
You prefer a platform with established expertise serving nonprofits since 1995

faq.q: Is Brevo better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: Brevo offers superior value for most users with its generous free tier, multi-channel capabilities, and integrated CRM. However, Constant Contact may be better for nonprofits and local businesses seeking simplicity and dedicated e-commerce features. Your choice depends on your specific business needs and budget.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Constant Contact?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly cheaper, offering a free plan supporting up to 100,000 subscribers with no paid requirement. Constant Contact starts at $12/month with no free option. For small businesses and startups, Brevo's free tier provides exceptional value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support standard email list imports and exports. Most email marketing platforms allow you to migrate your contacts and campaigns, though you may need to manually recreate some custom workflows or automations. It's recommended to export your data before canceling any service.
